package rulecoverage

func NegativeTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOk() string {
    ruleID := "type_assertion_without_comma_ok"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`v := i.(T)` without the comma-ok form in non-panic-safe code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
